debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f✝ : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
C : ℝ
f : ↑(spectrum ℂ a) → ℂ
x : H
⊢ ∀ (x_1 y : H),
    ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x (x_1 + y)) f =
      ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x x_1) f +
        ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) f
